name: package
title: Package
description: The declaration to install a package.

payloadkeys.title: Manifest URL
payloadkeys.content: The URL of the manifest document for the package that the device downloads. The manifest is returned as a `ManifestURL` property list. The `url` property of the manifest must point to the package (.pkg) file to install.

payloadkeys.title: Install Behavior
payloadkeys.content: A dictionary that describes how and when to install the package.

subkeys.title: Install
subkeys.content:
A string that specifies when the system installs the package:

- `Optional`: The user can install the package after the system activates the configuration.
- `Required`: The system installs the package after it activates the configuration.
